title: Crispy Peruvian Cauliflower Roast
description: A floral, crunchy, romantic Peruvian-inspired vegan dish featuring oven‑roasted cauliflower tossed with Peruvian spices and finished with lime‑cilantro.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C) and line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, ají amarillo paste, smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, salt, and pepper until well combined.
Add the cauliflower florets to the bowl and toss until each floret is evenly coated with the spice mixture.
Spread the cauliflower in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet, making sure the florets are not overcrowded.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, flipping the florets halfway through to promote even browning.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and transfer the cauliflower to a serving dish.
Squeeze the lime juice over the roasted cauliflower, then sprinkle with chopped cilantro if using.
Toss gently to coat, then serve immediately while the cauliflower is still crisp.
Optional: Garnish with additional lime wedges and a sprinkle of sea salt for extra flavor.
Enjoy the floral aroma and crunchy texture of this Peruvian-inspired vegan dish.
